hooks.name: Keep Dev Server Running
hooks.description: Ensures the SWF dev server on port 4321 stays running. Only stop for builds/deploys, then restart immediately after.

action.prompt: RULE: The SWF dev server on port 4321 must be kept running at all times during sessions. Never stop or terminate the dev server process unless you are about to run `astro build` or `wrangler deploy` (build/deploy). After the build or deploy completes, restart the dev server immediately. If the dev server is not running at session start, start it with: cd /Users/rajeevnaik/Code/xConvert.com/scrabblewordsfinder && npm run dev
